title: veronica × affinis
intro: Veronica × affinis is a hybrid plant species in the Veronica genus, commonly known as speedwell or gypsy flower. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues, and supporting the immune system. Veronica × affinis can be prepared as a herbal tea or infusion, and its leaves can also be dried or made into a tincture for use in folk medicine.
